user.title: Set up Nice Blinds Control
user.description: Configure your Nice protocol blinds. For RF433, you'll need an RF transmitter connected to your Raspberry Pi.

data_description.name: A friendly name for your blinds
data_description.protocol_type: Select rf433 for RF-controlled blinds or bidi_bus for BiDi-Bus
data_description.device_id: The RF code or device identifier (leave empty to configure later)
data_description.gpio_pin: GPIO pin number where RF transmitter is connected (default: 17)
data_description.move_time: Time it takes for blinds to fully open/close in seconds (default: 30)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the blinds controller
error.invalid_gpio_pin: Invalid GPIO pin (must be between 1 and 27)
